questions.text: 我不仅是屌丝，我还是joker,我还是咸鱼，这辈子没谈过一场恋爱，胆怯又自卑，我的青春就是一场又一场的意淫，每一天幻想着我也能有一个女孩子和我一起压马路，一起逛街，一起玩，现实却是爆了父母金币，读了个烂学校，混日子之后找班上，没有理想，没有目标，没有能力的三无人员，每次看到你能在网上开屌丝的玩笑，我都想哭，我就是地底下的老鼠，透过下水井的缝隙，窥探地上的各种美好，每一次看到这种都是对我心灵的一次伤害，对我生存空间的一次压缩，求求哥们给我们这种小丑一点活路吧，我真的不想在白天把枕巾哭湿一大片
questions.text_en: I'm not just a loser, I'm a joker, I'm a salted fish. Never had a relationship in my life, timid and insecure. My youth is one fantasy after another, dreaming every day that I could walk down the street with a girl, go shopping, have fun. But reality is draining my parents' money, going to a crappy school, finding a job after muddling through. No ideals, no goals, no abilities—a 'three-no' person. Every time I see you making fun of losers online, I want to cry. I'm like a rat underground, peeking at all the beauty above through the sewer grate. Every time I see this, it's a wound to my soul, a compression of my living space. Please, give us clowns some breathing room. I really don't want to wake up with a soaked pillowcase.

questions.text: 我不够好，周围的人都比我优秀
questions.text_en: I'm not good enough, everyone around me is better than me

questions.text: 我很清楚真正的自己是什么样的
questions.text_en: I know very well what my true self is like

questions.text: 我内心有真正追求的东西
questions.text_en: There's something I truly pursue deep inside

questions.text: 我一定要不断往上爬、变得更厉害
questions.text_en: I must keep climbing up and become more powerful

questions.text: 外人的评价对我来说无所吊谓。
questions.text_en: Other people's opinions don't matter to me at all.

questions.text: 对象超过5小时没回消息，说自己窜稀了，你会怎么想？
questions.text_en: Your partner hasn't replied for over 5 hours, saying they had diarrhea. What do you think?

options.label: 拉稀不可能5小时，也许ta隐瞒了我。
在信任和怀疑之间摇摆。
也许今天ta真的不太舒服。

options_en.label: Diarrhea can't last 5 hours, maybe they're hiding something.
Maybe they really don't feel well today.

questions.text: 我在感情里经常担心被对方抛弃
questions.text_en: In relationships, I often worry about being abandoned by the other person

questions.text: 我对天发誓，我对待每一份感情都是认真的！
questions.text_en: I swear to heaven, I take every relationship seriously!

questions.text: 你的恋爱对象是一个尊老爱幼，温柔敦厚，洁身自好，光明磊落，大义凛然，能言善辩，口才流利，观察入微，见多识广，博学多才，诲人不倦，和蔼可亲，平易近人，心地善良，慈善为怀，温文尔雅，满腹经纶，一丝不苟，中流砥柱，披荆斩棘，无与伦比的人，你会？
questions.text_en: Your partner is someone who respects elders and loves children, is gentle and honest, pure and self-disciplined, open and upright, righteous and dignified, eloquent and articulate, observant and detail-oriented, well-traveled and knowledgeable, learned and talented, tireless in teaching, kind and approachable, friendly and accessible, good-hearted and charitable, refined and cultured, full of wisdom, meticulous and conscientious, a mainstay and pillar, cutting through thorns and overcoming obstacles—truly unparalleled. What would you do?

options.label: 就算ta再优秀我也不会陷入太深。
会非常珍惜ta，也许会变成恋爱脑。

options_en.label: Even if they're excellent, I won't get too attached.
I would cherish them deeply, maybe become lovestruck.

questions.text: 恋爱后，对象非常黏人，你作何感想？
questions.text_en: After getting into a relationship, your partner is very clingy. How do you feel?

options.label: 我更喜欢保留独立空间

options_en.label: I prefer to keep my independent space

questions.text: 我在任何关系里都很重视个人空间
questions.text_en: In any relationship, I value personal space very much

options.label: 我更喜欢依赖与被依赖

questions.text: 大多数人是善良的
questions.text_en: Most people are kind

options.label: 其实邪恶的人心比世界上的痔疮更多。
是的，我愿相信好人更多。

options_en.label: Actually, evil hearts outnumber hemorrhoids in the world.
Yes, I choose to believe there are more good people.

questions.text: 你走在街上，一位萌萌的小女孩蹦蹦跳跳地朝你走来（正脸、侧脸看都萌，用vivo、苹果、华为、OPPO手机看都萌，实在是非常萌的那种），她递给你一根棒棒糖，此时你作何反应？
questions.text_en: You're walking down the street when an adorable little girl bounces toward you (cute from front and side, cute on vivo, iPhone, Huawei, OPPO—just really cute), and she offers you a lollipop. What's your reaction?

options.label: 呜呜她真好真可爱！居然给我棒棒糖！
这也许是一种新型诈骗？还是走开为好。

options_en.label: Aww she's so sweet and cute! A lollipop for me!
Is this some new scam? Better walk away.

questions.text: 快考试了，学校规定必须上晚自习，请假会扣分，但今晚你约了女/男神一起玩《绝地求生：刺激战场》（一款刺激的游戏），你怎么办？
questions.text_en: Exams are coming up. School requires evening self-study, and skipping will cost points. But tonight you have a date with your crush to play PUBG Mobile (an exciting game). What do you do?

options_en.label: Might as well ask for leave.

questions.text: 我喜欢打破常规，不喜欢被束缚
questions.text_en: I like breaking conventions and don't like being constrained

questions.text: 我做事通常有目标。
questions.text_en: I usually have goals when doing things.

questions.text: 突然某一天，我意识到人生哪有什么他妈的狗屁意义，人不过是和动物一样被各种欲望支配着，纯纯是被激素控制的东西，饿了就吃，困了就睡，一发情就想交配，我们简直和猪狗一样，所谓"人生意义"不过是自欺欺人的笑话。此时你会？
questions.text_en: One day, I realize life has no fucking meaning. Humans are just like animals, controlled by desires—purely hormone-driven creatures. Eat when hungry, sleep when tired, mate when horny. We're no different from pigs and dogs. So-called 'meaning of life' is just a self-deceiving joke. What do you do?

questions.text: 我做事主要为了取得成果和进步，而不是避免麻烦和风险。
questions.text_en: I do things mainly to achieve results and progress, not to avoid trouble and risks.

questions.text: 你因便秘坐在马桶上（已长达30分钟），拉不出很难受。此时你更像
questions.text_en: You've been sitting on the toilet for 30 minutes due to constipation. It hurts. At this moment, you're more like:

options.label: 再坐三十分钟看看，说不定就有了。
用力拍打自己的屁股并说：死屁股，快拉啊！
使用开塞露，快点拉出来才好。

options_en.label: Sit another 30 minutes, maybe it'll come.
Slap your butt hard and say: Stupid butt, poop already!
Use an enema, get it out quickly.

questions.text: 我做决定比较果断，不喜欢犹豫
questions.text_en: I make decisions decisively and don't like hesitating

questions.text: 此题没有题目，请盲选
questions.text_en: This question has no prompt. Please choose blindly.

options.label: 反复思考后感觉应该选A？

questions.text: 别人说你"执行力强"，你内心更接近哪句？
questions.text_en: When people say you have 'strong execution,' which thought is closer to your inner voice?

options.label: 我被逼到最后确实执行力超强。。。
是的，事情本来就该被推进

options_en.label: When forced to the end, I do execute strongly...
Yes, things should naturally be pushed forward.

questions.text: 我做事常常有计划，____
questions.text_en: I often make plans when doing things, ____

options_en.label: But plans can't keep up with changes.
Sometimes I complete them, sometimes not.
I hate when plans are disrupted.

questions.text: 你因玩《第五人格》（一款刺激的游戏）而结识许多网友，并被邀请线下见面，你的想法是？
questions.text_en: You've met many online friends through playing Identity V (an exciting game) and are invited to meet offline. What do you think?

options.label: 网上口嗨下就算了，真见面还是有点忐忑。
见网友也挺好，反正谁来聊我就聊两句。
我会打扮一番并热情聊天，万一呢，我是说万一呢？

options_en.label: Talking big online is enough; meeting in person makes me nervous.
Meeting online friends is fine, I'll chat with whoever comes.
I'll dress up and chat enthusiastically. What if, just what if?

questions.text: 朋友带了ta的朋友一起来玩，你最可能的状态是
questions.text_en: Your friend brings their friend to hang out. What's your most likely state?

options.label: 对"朋友的朋友"天然有点距离感，怕影响二人关系
朋友的朋友应该也算我的朋友！要热情聊天

options_en.label: Naturally distant from 'friends of friends,' afraid of affecting the relationship
Depends on the person, I'll hang if we click.
A friend's friend should be my friend too! Let's chat enthusiastically

questions.text: 我和人相处主打一个电子围栏，靠太近会自动报警。
questions.text_en: In relationships, I'm like an electric fence—get too close and the alarm goes off.

questions.text: 我渴望和我信任的人关系密切，熟得像失散多年的亲戚。
questions.text_en: I long to be close with people I trust, as familiar as long-lost relatives.

questions.text: 有时候你明明对一件事有不同的、负面的看法，但最后没说出来。多数情况下原因是：
questions.text_en: Sometimes you have different, negative opinions about something but don't voice them. Most of the time, the reason is:

options.label: 可能碍于情面或者关系。
不想让别人知道自己是个阴暗的人。

options_en.label: Maybe to save face or preserve the relationship.
Don't want others to know I'm a dark person.

questions.text: 我在不同人面前会表现出不一样的自己
questions.text_en: I show different sides of myself to different people

options.label: 我习惯将白酒灌在保温杯，当白开水喝，酒精令我信服。

options_en.label: A little drink lifts the mood, can't handle too much.
I pour liquor into a thermos and drink it like water. Alcohol convinces me.
